title: Fancy Messages
body:
An Immersive Story-telling sytem on NeoForge.

📖 What does this mod do?

This mod was created for the easy use by modpack authors to send a message to the players screen when they:
- Complete any Acheivement
- Enter any Biome
- Complete any quest from the mod "FTB Quests" (optional requirement)

Command Examples:

/prettymsg create advancement minecraft:adventure/sleep_in_bed "Header" "First line" "Second Line" "Third Line"

/prettymsg create biome minecraft:snowy_taiga "Header" "First line" "Second Line" "Third Line"

/prettymsg create quest (FTB Quest UUID) "Header" "First line" "Second Line" "Third Line"

Each Peice of text REQUIRES the use of "quotation" marks before and after each line in the message.
Please be sure to do the proper research to use the FTB Quests message system.

✅ Features:

Immersive messages set by an admin to display on the client side when the player does a defined task.

Commands must be made by a user with admin privalages.

Need help? Come check out my Discord server.

📖 Compatibility

- Capable of working with FTB Quests, but it is NOT required!
- Has no requirements and does not conflict with any mod it's been tested with.

Discord:

https://discord.com/invite/wuqqZbDdkh
